latin: Castellum magicum per colles ambulabat. intus magus pulcher sed vanus habitabat. puella, quae in anum mutata erat, ad eum venit ut auxilium peteret.

questions.prompt: What was unusual about the castle?

questions.target: She was turned into an old woman
choices: She was turned into an old woman

translation: A magical castle walked across the hills. Inside lived a handsome but vain wizard. A girl, who had been turned into an old woman, came to him to seek help.
